name: Allie Chronobeauty Color-Tuning UV 01
pros: Lowest price at ¥1,980 makes it accessible for daily use and budget-strapped expats
Cute Chiikawa character edition appeals to anime/character goods collectors in Japan
Allie brand is established and widely available in Japanese drugstores for easy repurchasing
cons: Zero reviews on Rakuten makes it impossible to assess real-world performance or legitimacy
Limited variant information and unclear shade matching for non-Japanese speakers creates purchasing uncertainty
shortDescription: Budget Allie sunscreen with character design. No reviews yet—purchase at your own risk.
review: Allie's Chronobeauty UV is the cheapest option at ¥1,980, and the Chiikawa design is undeniably cute. However, zero Rakuten reviews is a red flag. This appears to be a newer SKU or limited release, so actual quality and effectiveness are unverified. Only buy if you're willing to be an early adopter or already trust the Allie brand from past use.
